notes.title: Doctrine: the gate is down
notes.body: Orientation is a weapon. In free fall, whoever picks 'down' first controls the geometry of the fight.

notes.title: On empathy
notes.body: You cannot beat what you refuse to understand. Model the enemy until their next move is obvious.

notes.title: Toon integrity
notes.body: Small squads, single-word commands, total trust. A toon that hesitates is already frozen.
